exemplar.title: What constraints are there on the pursuit of knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What constraints are there on the pursuit of knowledge?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct, wellâcontextualized real-world objects
Coherent links made between each object and the chosen IA prompt
Effective use of personal reflection to deepen engagement with knowledge constraints
weaknesses: Explanations lack consistently precise evidence and sometimes rely on narrative rather than analysis
Frequent incomplete or truncated sentences disrupt the clarity of arguments
Inconsistent integration and formatting of citations weakens the reliability of the justifications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs total mark of 3 must be allocated to this single TOK Exhibition criterion. Although the submission surpasses superficial linking and demonstrates a solid attempt to justify each object (characteristic of the 5â6 band), uneven depth of analysis, gaps in evidence integration and coherence issues justify a reduction to the low end of the 3â4 band. The work shows clear object identification and thematic consistency, but recurring weaknesses in precision, completeness and citations prevent a higher mark. Therefore, a final score of 3 accurately reflects the balance of strengths and areas for improvement.

annotations.comment: The description of the newspaper front page mentions the date but omits the specific headline or article focus that links to Vipeholm ethics, reducing contextual precision.
Include an annotated excerpt or highlight specific article elements visible in the image to support claims about ethical breaches more directly.
This fragment âserves as a starkâ is cut off; ensure complete sentences to maintain coherence and avoid gaps in justifying the object.
This concise summary effectively establishes the Vipeholm Projectâs ethical failures, aligning well with the IA prompt by highlighting informed consent constraints.
The claim about systemic dehumanization would benefit from direct quotations or statistics from the article to substantiate the argument.
The selection of IA prompt 15 (âWhat constraints are there on the pursuit of knowledge?â) provides a clear thematic framework for all three objects, effectively guiding the exhibitionâs focus.
The image of the Spanish edition lacks a specific caption indicating edition, translator, or publication date, which weakens the real-world context.
The justification focuses on universal themes but does not explicitly link a particular Spanish editionâs features to constraints in translation.
To strengthen this analysis, include specific examples of idioms or proverbs in French and their Spanish counterparts to illustrate meaning shifts concretely.
This sentence is truncated and ends abruptly, disrupting the clarity of the argument; complete the thought to reinforce the link to knowledge constraints.
Personal reflection enriches the exhibit by connecting translation challenges to lived experience, deepening engagement with the knowledge constraints.
Integrate a brief excerpt from the internal reports or protocols to exemplify specific methodological breaches and support the discussion with concrete evidence.
The object identification clearly names the artwork and contextualizes it within Coleâs series, satisfying the need for precise real-world context.
The analysis suggests constraints but remains speculative; reference specific visual elements (e.g., storm imagery) and link them to knowledge ambition more concretely.
Consider including an image of âDestructionâ to visually anchor the analysis and allow direct reference to compositional details.
The discussion of ethical constraints in âDestructionâ adeptly ties the narrative to broader moral considerations, reinforcing the IA promptâs focus on consequences.
The personal art background is informative but diverts focus; condense this section and allocate more space to deepening the analysis of the paintingâs knowledge implications.
The conclusion summarizes themes but would be stronger by explicitly restating how each object uniquely illustrates a constraint, rather than a collective overview.
Reference entry lacks access date and could include author details to adhere to a consistent citation style and strengthen the bibliographyâs reliability.
The Wikipedia citation should specify retrieval date and consider replacing with a more scholarly source for art historical context.
Combine the split URL and title lines to maintain readability, and ensure non-English sources include translated titles for clarity.
Provide the full URL in a hyperlink format or shortened DOI-style citation to improve accessibility for the reader.
Consider adding section subheadings for each object analysis to improve navigability and clearly delineate the connections to the IA prompt.
To reinforce evidential support, incorporate in-text citations consistently where direct references are made, ensuring points are clearly attributed.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA

these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not

There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
